text: Court releases purported suicide note from Jeffrey Epstein - The Washington Post
fullText: The note, which was discovered by Epstein’s former cellmate, had been under seal for years. No court or investigative agency has vouched for its authenticity.

text: Live updates: Iran reviewing US proposal as source says both sides moving toward memo to end war - CNN
fullText: President Donald Trump said the US has had “very good talks” with Iran over the past 24 hours. Follow for live news updates.

text: 3 evacuated from hantavirus cruise ship as Spain says it will dock in Canary Islands despite local opposition - CBS News
fullText: Three passengers have been evacuated from a cruise ship hit by a hantavirus outbreak, as related cases are confirmed in Switzerland and South Africa.

text: Justice Department can keep 2020 election ballots seized from Georgia’s Fulton County, judge rules - AP News
fullText: The federal government doesn't have to return the 2020 election ballots from Georgia’s Fulton County that were seized by the FBI from a warehouse near Atlanta. U.S. District Judge J.P. Boulee issued the ruling Wednesday. Lawyers for the county had argued that…

text: Blake Shelton Missing Gwen Stefani's No Doubt Sphere Opening Night - TMZ
fullText: No Doubt, fronted by Gwen Stefani, is kicking off their Sphere residency in Las Vegas in a big way ... but Blake Shelton won't be there to watch his lady light up the stage ... TMZ has learned.

text: 'That's not how it works' - the judge crossing swords with Musk in court - BBC
fullText: The feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.

text: Justin Baldoni's lawyer addresses reports that no money was exchanged in Blake Lively settlement - Yahoo
fullText: In the wake of the Justin Baldoni and Blake Lively settlement, Baldoni's lawyer is addressing whether any money was exchanged in the agreement.

text: 18 arrested, 40 pounds of fentanyl seized in massive drug raid at MacArthur Park, South LA, Calabasas, San Gabriel - ABC7 Los Angeles
fullText: Federal and local law enforcement announced a massive drug raid and arrested 18 people on Wednesday in multiple SoCal locations -- mainly MacArthur Park.

text: Specific expansion of motor cortical projections in a singing mouse - Nature
fullText: High-throughput barcoded neuroanatomy of two closely related rodent species with divergent vocalizations reveals differences in long-range projection motifs in the brain that may support these differences in vocal complexity.

text: Kentucky Derby winner Golden Tempo is not running in the Preakness - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
fullText: Kentucky Derby winner Golden Tempo will not run in the Preakness Stakes next weekend

text: Nintendo announces a new Star Fox for the Switch 2 - The Verge
fullText: Nintendo held a surprise Nintendo Direct presentation, where it announced a new Star Fox game for the Switch 2.

text: Expanding the human proteome with microproteins and peptideins - Nature
fullText: A large-scale proteomics analysis of the dark proteome by the TransCODE Consortium reveals many translated non-canonical open reading frames to encode microproteins and peptideins.

text: RNA-triggered cell killing with CRISPR–Cas12a2 - Nature
fullText: Cas12a2 enables RNA-triggered, sequence-specific killing of eukaryotic cells via widespread DNA shredding, allowing selective elimination of cells on the basis of gene expression, including virus-infected or mutation-bearing cells.

text: Champions League semifinal recap: Dembelé KOs Bayern, sends PSG to final - ESPN
fullText: Paris Saint-Germain will look to retain their Champions League title in the final against Arsenal after eliminating Bayern Munich, winning 6-5 on aggregate.

text: ‘Devil Wears Prada 2’ costume designer ‘disappointed’ in stars who attended Bezos-backed Met Gala 2026 - Page Six
fullText: Famed costumer Molly Rogers also skewered Bezos’s bride and her custom red carpet gown, quipping: “How did she make Schiaparelli look so cheap?!”

text: WBD Sees $2.9 Billion Q1 Loss On M&A Charges Including Termination Fee Paramount Paid Netflix - Deadline
fullText: Warner Bros. Discovery posted a $2.9 billion Q1 loss that will likely be a one-time accounting blip, it hopes. It includes the termination fee Netflix paid Paramount.

text: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since Hezbollah ceasefire - BBC
fullText: Israel says it targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in the capital, the first strike of its kind since mid-April.

text: Beaver that bit ‘several people’ in New Jersey tests positive for rabies - Global News
fullText: 'On Sunday, May 3rd, it was reported that a beaver at Lake Henry had contact with several people and has since tested positive for rabies,' the Mahwah Health Department said.
